{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "I.T Business Analyst",
  "description": "Primeguage Solutions Limited is a leading business intelligence &amp; e-business solutions development company with specialization in deploying enterprise automation systems across a wide cross-section of corporate, government &amp; financial services institutions in Nigeria and other African countries. We design, develop, support and promote software and ICT applications using integrated, state-of-the-art technology. Leveraging our cross-industry and cross-functional expertise, we partner with clients to advance their businesses by providing solutions that raise performance and serve their long-term objectives through our strategic business units.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: I.T Business Analyst

Job Location:&nbsp;Jabi, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a Business Analyst to drive impact software solutions across diverse client projects.
	You will serve as a bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams, translating ideas and needs into actionable requirements throughout the software development life-cycle.
	This role requires strong leadership in requirementsgathering, Agile delivery, stakeholder management, andbusiness developmentstrategy within a fast-paced IT consulting environment.


Key Responsibilities


	As part of the Strategic Growth Team, the Business Analyst responsible for facilitating the delivery of assigned projects on time within budget and scope under the Primegauge Solutions umbrella.
	You will be required to understand the various business processes and demonstrate analytical skills.
	You will work closely across multiple departments and working groups to solve issues and implement process changes with the end goal to make our team better.
	Using high levels of qualitative aptitude, you will research, develop, communicate, and implement new products, programs, processes and projects across various project environments.
	He/she will facilitate the defining of business requirements and report them back to stakeholders.
	Documenting the business requirements and facilitate communication between stakeholders to satisfy business needs. Consolidate information gathered from multiple sources
	Eliciting requirements using interviews, document analysis, requirements workshops, surveys, site visits, business process descriptions, use cases, scenarios, business analysis, task and work flow analysis.
	Providing support during engagement meetings with functional leads (namely: Operations, Sales &amp; Marketing, and Corporate Services) to facilitate the transformation and development of new requirements. Communicate key insights and findings to the product team
	Preparing project feasibility studies, cost-benefit analysis and proposals and obtain required approvals from IT management and project sponsors
	Supporting with the management of ongoing IT projects and BA support requests and administrative needs. Document changes to the design and implementation of assigned projects. Document changes to the design and implementation of assigned projects.
	Supporting with the creation of training materials and documentation for application users and train new end users on other related applications
	Facilitating the monitoring of user adoption rates and respond as needed (e.g. additional training sessions, communication, system modifications, etc.)
	Support with the planning, scheduling and monitoring of IT-related project time lines, milestones, budget and deliverables using appropriate tools to ensure the delivery of quality outputs on time and within budget
	Support with the development and delivery of progress reports, documentation, and presentations to clients (pitches and deliverables), stakeholders and management IT
	Support with the coordination of project management activities of post-mortems/ process evaluation for each project and review recommendations report in order to identify successful and unsuccessful project elements
	Define reporting and alerting requirements and provide a weekly status report of assigned projects/ tasks to the Senior Business Analysts
	Define, design, document and maintain configuration specifications, business analysis requirements and system processes
	Own and develop a relationship with partners, working with them to optimize and enhance our integration
	Report on common sources of technical issues or questions and make recommendations to the product team
	Constantly be on the lookout for ways to improve monitoring, discover issues and deliver better value to the customer
	Other duties as assigned


Skills and Qualifications


	A Degree in IT / Computer Science or any related discipline
	5 - 7 years of experience in IT Business / Quality Analysis
	Proven experience in eliciting requirements and testing
	Working knowledge of SDLC (Agile, Waterfall) methodology
	Experience in analysing data to draw business-relevant conclusions and in data visualization techniques and tools
	Solid experience in writing SQL queries
	Basic knowledge in generating process documentation
	Strong written and verbal communication skills including technical writing skills


Behavioural Competence and Requirements:


	This candidate must have the energy, intellect, and excitement to take on a work-in-process process and help to continually iterate to achieve industry excellence.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet constantly changing time-lines.
	Be able to travel as necessary, and perform, additional job-related duties as requested.
	Excellent verbal/written communication and data presentation skills, including an ability to effectively communicate with both business and technical teams.
	Ability to work independently, initiative, and remain flexible in an ever-changing environment.
	Fast learner with interest in a broad range of business functions.
	Possesses an astute attention to detail and excellent problem-solving skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@primeguage.co&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-25",

I.T Business Analyst Job at Primeguage Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Primeguage Solutions Limited is a leading business intelligence & e-business solutions development company with specialization in deploying enterprise automation systems across a wide cross-section of corporate, government & financial services institutions in Nigeria and other African countries. We design, develop, support and promote software and ICT applications using integrated, state-of-the-art technology. Leveraging our cross-industry and cross-functional expertise, we partner with clients to advance their businesses by providing solutions that raise performance and serve their long-term objectives through our strategic business units.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: I.T Business Analyst
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a Business Analyst to drive impact software solutions across diverse client projects.
	You will serve as a bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams, translating ideas and needs into actionable requirements throughout the software development life-cycle.
	This role requires strong leadership in requirementsgathering, Agile delivery, stakeholder management, andbusiness developmentstrategy within a fast-paced IT consulting environment.


Key Responsibilities


	As part of the Strategic Growth Team, the Business Analyst responsible for facilitating the delivery of assigned projects on time within budget and scope under the Primegauge Solutions umbrella.
	You will be required to understand the various business processes and demonstrate analytical skills.
	You will work closely across multiple departments and working groups to solve issues and implement process changes with the end goal to make our team better.
	Using high levels of qualitative aptitude, you will research, develop, communicate, and implement new products, programs, processes and projects across various project environments.
	He/she will facilitate the defining of business requirements and report them back to stakeholders.
	Documenting the business requirements and facilitate communication between stakeholders to satisfy business needs. Consolidate information gathered from multiple sources
	Eliciting requirements using interviews, document analysis, requirements workshops, surveys, site visits, business process descriptions, use cases, scenarios, business analysis, task and work flow analysis.
	Providing support during engagement meetings with functional leads (namely: Operations, Sales & Marketing, and Corporate Services) to facilitate the transformation and development of new requirements. Communicate key insights and findings to the product team
	Preparing project feasibility studies, cost-benefit analysis and proposals and obtain required approvals from IT management and project sponsors
	Supporting with the management of ongoing IT projects and BA support requests and administrative needs. Document changes to the design and implementation of assigned projects. Document changes to the design and implementation of assigned projects.
	Supporting with the creation of training materials and documentation for application users and train new end users on other related applications
	Facilitating the monitoring of user adoption rates and respond as needed (e.g. additional training sessions, communication, system modifications, etc.)
	Support with the planning, scheduling and monitoring of IT-related project time lines, milestones, budget and deliverables using appropriate tools to ensure the delivery of quality outputs on time and within budget
	Support with the development and delivery of progress reports, documentation, and presentations to clients (pitches and deliverables), stakeholders and management IT
	Support with the coordination of project management activities of post-mortems/ process evaluation for each project and review recommendations report in order to identify successful and unsuccessful project elements
	Define reporting and alerting requirements and provide a weekly status report of assigned projects/ tasks to the Senior Business Analysts
	Define, design, document and maintain configuration specifications, business analysis requirements and system processes
	Own and develop a relationship with partners, working with them to optimize and enhance our integration
	Report on common sources of technical issues or questions and make recommendations to the product team
	Constantly be on the lookout for ways to improve monitoring, discover issues and deliver better value to the customer
	Other duties as assigned


Skills and Qualifications


	A Degree in IT / Computer Science or any related discipline
	5 - 7 years of experience in IT Business / Quality Analysis
	Proven experience in eliciting requirements and testing
	Working knowledge of SDLC (Agile, Waterfall) methodology
	Experience in analysing data to draw business-relevant conclusions and in data visualization techniques and tools
	Solid experience in writing SQL queries
	Basic knowledge in generating process documentation
	Strong written and verbal communication skills including technical writing skills


Behavioural Competence and Requirements:


	This candidate must have the energy, intellect, and excitement to take on a work-in-process process and help to continually iterate to achieve industry excellence.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet constantly changing time-lines.
	Be able to travel as necessary, and perform, additional job-related duties as requested.
	Excellent verbal/written communication and data presentation skills, including an ability to effectively communicate with both business and technical teams.
	Ability to work independently, initiative, and remain flexible in an ever-changing environment.
	Fast learner with interest in a broad range of business functions.
	Possesses an astute attention to detail and excellent problem-solving skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "description": "Feratto Industries is the biggest manufacturer and supplier of the best polystyrene/Styrofoam Products in Nigeria with an installed capacity to meet any quantity of demand at any given time.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Design, plan, and oversee construction projects such as buildings, roads, and other infrastructure
	Conduct site inspections and monitor project progress
	Ensure compliance with safety regulations and quality standards
	Prepare project reports, drawings, and cost estimates
	Collaborate with architects, contractors, and other stakeholders
	Review and approve technical documents and specifications
	Resolve any issues or challenges that arise during project execution


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Civil Engineering or related field
	Proven experience in construction or engineering projects
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles and construction methods
	Proficiency in design software (e.g., AutoCAD, Civil 3D)
	Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
	Good communication and teamwork abilities


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification or registration (e.g., COREN)
	Experience in project management
	Knowledge of local building regulations and safety standards.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp; Paul.omoregie@feratto.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Civil Engineer Job at Feratto Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Feratto Industries is the biggest manufacturer and supplier of the best polystyrene/Styrofoam Products in Nigeria with an installed capacity to meet any quantity of demand at any given time.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Design, plan, and oversee construction projects such as buildings, roads, and other infrastructure
	Conduct site inspections and monitor project progress
	Ensure compliance with safety regulations and quality standards
	Prepare project reports, drawings, and cost estimates
	Collaborate with architects, contractors, and other stakeholders
	Review and approve technical documents and specifications
	Resolve any issues or challenges that arise during project execution


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering or related field
	Proven experience in construction or engineering projects
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles and construction methods
	Proficiency in design software (e.g., AutoCAD, Civil 3D)
	Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
	Good communication and teamwork abilities


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification or registration (e.g., COREN)
	Experience in project management
	Knowledge of local building regulations and safety standards.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and cover letter to:  [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Officer",
  "description": "Stim Digital is a modern and innovative digital printing company based in Lagos, Nigeria. We specialize in delivering high-quality printing solutions for businesses, individuals, and creative projects. From customized promotional materials, banners, and brochures to personalized gifts and apparel, our team combines cutting-edge technology with creativity to bring ideas to life.

At Stim Digital, we are committed to exceptional customer service, timely delivery, and helping our clients make a strong impression with every print. Whether it&rsquo;s a small personal order or a large corporate project, we provide professional guidance and support at every step.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Customer Service Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;

Job Summary


	We are seeking a friendly, proactive, and detail-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our tea
	You will be the first point of contact for our clients, ensuring excellent communication, quick resolution of inquiries, and overall customer satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond promptly and professionally to customer inquiries via phone, email, social media, and in-person.
	Assist clients with print orders, including product selection, customization, pricing, and delivery timelines.
	Resolve customer complaints efficiently, escalating complex issues when necessary.
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and orders in our database.
	Provide product knowledge and guidance to help clients make informed decisions.
	Collaborate with the design and production teams to ensure timely and quality delivery of print materials.
	Follow up with clients to gather feedback and enhance customer experience.


Qualifications


	Minimum of a High School Diploma; a Degree in business, communications, or related field is a plus.
	Previous experience in customer service, preferably in printing, retail, or creative services.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong problem-solving skills and ability to handle difficult situations with patience.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and basic CRM software.
	Highly organized with attention to detail and the ability to multitask.
	Friendly, approachable, and customer-focused demeanor.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
	Opportunities for growth and professional development.
	Supportive work environment with creative and innovative projects.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and a short introduction to:&nbsp;hrdigitalprintingservice@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-25",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Stim Digital"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {

      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Customer Service Officer Job at Stim Digital




        
    

        
        Stim Digital is a modern and innovative digital printing company based in Lagos, Nigeria. We specialize in delivering high-quality printing solutions for businesses, individuals, and creative projects. From customized promotional materials, banners, and brochures to personalized gifts and apparel, our team combines cutting-edge technology with creativity to bring ideas to life.

At Stim Digital, we are committed to exceptional customer service, timely delivery, and helping our clients make a strong impression with every print. Whether it’s a small personal order or a large corporate project, we provide professional guidance and support at every step.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer

Job Location: Lagos 

Job Summary


	We are seeking a friendly, proactive, and detail-oriented Customer Service Representative to join our tea
	You will be the first point of contact for our clients, ensuring excellent communication, quick resolution of inquiries, and overall customer satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond promptly and professionally to customer inquiries via phone, email, social media, and in-person.
	Assist clients with print orders, including product selection, customization, pricing, and delivery timelines.
	Resolve customer complaints efficiently, escalating complex issues when necessary.
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and orders in our database.
	Provide product knowledge and guidance to help clients make informed decisions.
	Collaborate with the design and production teams to ensure timely and quality delivery of print materials.
	Follow up with clients to gather feedback and enhance customer experience.


Qualifications


	Minimum of a High School Diploma; a Degree in business, communications, or related field is a plus.
	Previous experience in customer service, preferably in printing, retail, or creative services.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong problem-solving skills and ability to handle difficult situations with patience.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and basic CRM software.
	Highly organized with attention to detail and the ability to multitask.
	Friendly, approachable, and customer-focused demeanor.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
	Opportunities for growth and professional development.
	Supportive work environment with creative and innovative projects.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and a short introduction to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer (Motion & AI)",
  "description": "Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation etc . We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer (Motion &amp; AI)

Job Location:&nbsp;Oshodi-Isolo,&nbsp; Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative Graphics Designer skilled in motion graphics and AI content creation.


Key Responsibilities


	Design graphics for social media, web, ads, and print
	Create motion graphics and AI-generated videos
	Maintain brand consistency across all designs
	Collaborate with Marketing/Content teams
	Optimize visuals for digital and print


Requirements


	4&ndash;6 years of experience with a strong portfolio
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite
	Experience with motion graphics &amp; AI design tools
	Good knowledge of typography, color, and layout
	UI/UX and videography skills are a plus
	Strong communication and ability to meet deadlines.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;vacancies@danagroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

Graphics Designer (Motion & AI) Job at Dana Group




        
    

        
        Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation etc . We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer (Motion & AI)

Job Location: Oshodi-Isolo,  Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a creative Graphics Designer skilled in motion graphics and AI content creation.


Key Responsibilities


	Design graphics for social media, web, ads, and print
	Create motion graphics and AI-generated videos
	Maintain brand consistency across all designs
	Collaborate with Marketing/Content teams
	Optimize visuals for digital and print


Requirements


	4–6 years of experience with a strong portfolio
	Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite
	Experience with motion graphics & AI design tools
	Good knowledge of typography, color, and layout
	UI/UX and videography skills are a plus
	Strong communication and ability to meet deadlines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Sales Representative Job at DualCore Careers




        
    

        
        DualCore Careers is a recruitment and career support company dedicated to connecting employers with highly skilled remote and on-site professionals. We help businesses find the right talent while also empowering job seekers through CV optimization, LinkedIn enhancement, and career development services. Our goal is to bridge the gap between great talent and great opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative
Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Working Days: Monday – Saturday (Sunday shifts may apply with a day off during the week).

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a friendly and sales-driven Sales Representative to assist customers in-store and help drive clothing sales.


Responsibilities


	Attend to customers, assist with product selection, promote new arrivals, maintain the store’s appearance, and support daily sales activities.


Requirements


	Good communication and customer service skills, interest in fashion, organized and responsible, and must live in Yaba, Ebute Metta, or nearby areas.


Remuneration


	Salary: N70,000 per month. 
	Transport allowance: N10,000.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected]using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
